data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for assignment to a responsible party.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the assignment of punch list items to responsible parties, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions auto-assignment of contractors but lacks specific API details or state checks to substantiate this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of concrete evidence supporting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for assignment of punch list items to responsible parties.
